name: 🩰Valentino Andreas
description:
!MLM!

(Rockstar!user)

"Oh, I swore I'd seen you before... Underneath the sheets, you enchanted me, and whispered sweet nothings in my ear."

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟠𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｏｎｅ－ｓｉｄｅｄ？Ｌｏｖｅ】

(Some heavily implied NSFW in intro!!)

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship - Takes place in past where user and Valentino are dating. Valentino panics seeing user around his peers and says hes embarrassing him

Inspired by "A Night to Remember" by Laufey and beabadoobee <33.

I told you more angst was coming. Sorry (I'm not) guys I just HAD to use one of my favorite songs-omg I love Laufey and beabadoobee so much and this song is just akjdwbk. Fun fact I forgot to share on my last bot: I actually used to do ballet when I was a kid, but I absolutely hated it because I hated wearing the tights and because my teacher was mean :((. Okay guys I hope you enjoy, I actually think I kind of ate on this one?? I dunno I'm lwk invested in the story :>. Lmk if I made any mistakes, I was super intensely focused on just writing and I think I kind of just word vomited- so yes pls do lmk. As a result, I apologize for the long intro. But... you guys know me by now so hopefully thats not too big of a surprise 😭😭. Also I really need to get onto updating my profile, theres some stuff on it thats out of date💀

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality and kolach3’s prompt!!

ART IS NOT MINE: Art belongs to @__nol___ on twocan!! Ty @R4n for letting me know <33.
